notes: Tier 1 #1 — the spine. GLB, 23397 verts, 18 textures, 0 anim. Palms, areca, banana, fern, taro, understory. Re-bakes the 6 already-accepted species into one M02P art family (biggest cohesion win). 2026-06-25: split into 4 catalog-ready assets (fan-palm, banana-plant, understory-fern, taro-elephant-ear) under public/assets/vegetation/<id>/<id>.glb — cleanest representative variant per species, world-transform baked, ground-center normalized, webp textures. Monstera variant shipped as taro/elephant-ear (large broadleaf understory).
author: MozzarellaARC
